item.title: Loading Driver from User-Mode Program via SSDT Hooking
item.description: Welcome to my blog. In this blog, i will demonstrate SSDT Hooking technique. In this article, we will examine how SSDT Hooking works, why it is used, and how it can be implemented. We will begin by understanding the System Service Descriptor Table (SSDT) and its role in managing system calls within the Windows kernel. Next, we will take a closer look at this technique through a project I have prepared for SSDT Hooking.
